Home / Service Areas / Lyons

Chiropractor in Lyons, CO

Trusted local professionals serving Lyons and surrounding communities

Serving Lyons, CO

Horizon Chiropractor provides compassionate care to the Lyons community. Our gentle techniques help residents maintain active lifestyles despite the physical demands of mountain living. We specialize in helping musicians, artists, and outdoor enthusiasts stay healthy. Lyons' unique character deserves specialized chiropractic care. We understand the challenges of flood recovery and the physical toll of creative work. Our team is committed to supporting Lyons' vibrant community through quality healthcare services.

Lyons is known as the Double Gateway to the Rockies with a strong music scene.

Chiropractor Services in Lyons

Spinal Adjustments

Precise manual adjustments to restore proper alignment and relieve pressure on nerves.

Learn more →

Sports Injury Rehabilitation

Specialized care for athletes recovering from injuries or looking to prevent them.

Learn more →

Prenatal Chiropractic

Gentle care designed specifically for expecting mothers' changing needs.

Learn more →

Posture Correction

Solutions for tech neck, desk slump, and other modern posture problems.

Learn more →

Pediatric Chiropractic

Gentle care for children's developing nervous systems and musculoskeletal health.

Learn more →

Auto Injury Recovery

Comprehensive care for whiplash and other common car accident injuries.

Learn more →

Wellness Care

Maintenance care to keep your nervous system functioning at its best.

Learn more →

Need Chiropractor in Lyons?

Contact us today for a free estimate. We provide professional, reliable service throughout Lyons and the surrounding area.
